profile.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.positioning_statement: Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in Backend Systems, Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps, Automation, Distributed Systems, and Modern Web Applications

professional_summary: Full-stack software engineer with demonstrated experience designing, building, deploying, and scaling production-grade systems across frontend, backend, distributed processing, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps automation. Built complete solutions including distributed data extraction platforms, event-driven cloud processing systems, CI/CD pipelines, workflow automation platforms, mobile commerce applications, and real-time collaboration systems. Primary technologies include React, Next.js, TypeScript, React Native, Node.js, Python, AWS (EC2, ECS, EKS, Lambda, SNS, SQS, EventBridge), Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, Terraform, CloudFormation, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, and observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Loki, CloudWatch).

professional_experience.overview: Working as a DevSecOps and Full-Stack Engineer building cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, automation systems, distributed backend services, and production deployment workflows.
responsibilities: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure on AWS
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD
Develop Infrastructure as Code solutions using CloudFormation and Terraform
Configure containerized deployments using Docker and AWS ECS
Build event-driven backend services using AWS SNS, SQS, and EventBridge
Implement observability using CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki
Automate software delivery, deployment, monitoring, and operational workflows
Improve security, deployment reliability, and production automation

professional_experience.overview: Developed modern React and React Native applications for multiple client projects, focusing on user experience, reusable components, API integration, and scalable frontend architecture.
responsibilities: Develop React and React Native applications
Build reusable UI components and application layouts
Integrate REST APIs and backend services
Implement authentication and role-based workflows
Manage application state and frontend architecture
Optimize application performance and responsiveness
Collaborate with backend developers and designers

professional_experience.overview: Developed a React Native mobile commerce application integrated with a headless Shopify backend.
responsibilities: Develop mobile application features using React Native
Integrate Shopify GraphQL APIs
Build product catalog and order management workflows
Synchronize inventory and order information
Improve application performance and usability
Collaborate with backend and product teams

professional_experience.overview: Worked on full-stack web applications across e-commerce, restaurant management, and financial workflow systems using the MERN stack.
responsibilities: Develop backend APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React-based frontend applications
Design MongoDB data models
Implement authentication and authorization
Integrate third-party services and cloud storage
Develop workflow-based business applications

professional_experience.overview: Delivered freelance MERN stack projects for international clients, building responsive web applications and REST APIs while managing complete project lifecycles from requirements to deployment.
responsibilities: Build full-stack MERN applications
Develop REST APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React user interfaces
Design MongoDB database schemas
Deploy client applications
Maintain client communication and project delivery

projects.name: Tender Procurement Intelligence Platform

classification.business_domain: Procurement intelligence and government tender data extraction
classification.architecture_style: Queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines

projects.overview: Distributed data extraction system processing 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines.
engineering_contributions: Designed queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines
Built 20 parallel workers completing full extraction and processing cycles in approximately 5 minutes per batch
Implemented validation, transformation, and deduplication workflows for extracted data
Developed distributed worker fleets for automated tender extraction across government portals
measurable_outcomes: Reduced processing from hours of manual effort to approximately 5-minute automated cycles with 20 parallel workers
Automated procurement data extraction across 50+ government portals

summaries.one_line: Distributed procurement intelligence system extracting and processing data from 50+ government portals with 20 parallel workers
summaries.short: Queue-based Playwright worker platform that automated tender extraction and ETL processing across 50+ government portals, completing batches in about 5 minutes
summaries.executive: Built a distributed procurement data extraction platform that replaced hours of manual collection with automated, parallelized processing across government portals
summaries.technical: Designed a queue-driven Playwright worker fleet with ETL processing, validation, deduplication, and parallel execution using 20 workers for fast extraction cycles

projects.name: Event-Driven Processing Platform on AWS

classification.business_domain: Cloud processing platform and asynchronous backend operations
classification.architecture_style: Event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability

projects.overview: Production-grade event-driven processing system using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, and Redis pub/sub with full observability.
engineering_contributions: Designed and operated event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, and Redis pub/sub
Implemented asynchronous processing with containerized workers and queue-based decoupling
Built comprehensive observability with OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki
Developed retry logic, dead-letter queues, circuit breakers, and failure isolation patterns

summaries.one_line: Production-grade AWS event-driven processing platform using ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability
summaries.short: Designed and operated an AWS event-driven platform with asynchronous queues, containerized workers, Redis pub/sub, distributed tracing, and observability
summaries.executive: Built a cloud-native processing system that improved scalability, reliability, and operational visibility for production workloads
summaries.technical: Implemented an event-driven architecture using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki

projects.name: DevOps CI/CD Pipeline System

classification.business_domain: Software delivery automation and release operations
classification.architecture_style: Automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback

projects.overview: Automated build, test, security scanning, containerization (Docker), and deployment pipeline with full observability and rollback.
engineering_contributions: Built automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback
Implemented Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and CloudFormation for reproducible environments
Developed zero-downtime deployment patterns with rollback support
Automated validation, security checks, containerization, and deployment workflows
measurable_outcomes: Reduced full environment provisioning to a single-command deployment using Infrastructure as Code

summaries.one_line: Automated CI/CD pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, deployment, observability, and rollback
summaries.short: Built a DevOps delivery system that automated validation, security checks, containerization, deployment, and rollback support
summaries.executive: Delivered release automation that improved deployment repeatability, environment consistency, and operational confidence
summaries.technical: Implemented CI/CD workflows using pipeline tooling, Docker, Infrastructure as Code, zero-downtime deployment patterns, security scanning, observability, and rollback

projects.name: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform

classification.business_domain: Tax rebate processing, financial workflow, refund management
classification.architecture_style: State-controlled workflow platform for onboarding, verification, document processing, calculation, review, approval, and reconciliation

projects.overview: Workflow-driven tax rebate lifecycle platform replacing manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval processes.
engineering_contributions: Built state-controlled financial workflow platform for customer onboarding, identity verification, document processing, tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and reconciliation
Designed workflow engine with explicit lifecycle states and controlled state transitions
Replaced manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval processes with centralized system
Implemented configurable tax calculations and financial reconciliation workflows

summaries.one_line: Workflow-driven tax rebate platform for onboarding, identity verification, document processing, tax calculations, approvals, and refund reconciliation
summaries.short: Built a state-controlled financial workflow platform replacing manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval processes
summaries.executive: Delivered an operational system that centralized tax rebate processing from customer onboarding through refund reconciliation
summaries.technical: Designed a workflow engine with explicit lifecycle states for identity verification, document processing, configurable calculations, staff review, refund approval, and reconciliation

projects.name: Multi-Source AI News Aggregator

classification.business_domain: Content aggregation and intelligent news classification
classification.architecture_style: Layered processing system with multi-source web scraping, AI classification engine, REST API layer, and unified timeline interface

projects.overview: Intelligent content consolidation system with web scraping, AI-based classification, and unified timeline interface for structured news consumption across multiple sources.
engineering_contributions: Designed layered processing system with multi-source web scraping, AI classification engine, REST API layer, and unified timeline interface
Built multi-source scraper extracting structured article data from heterogeneous news sources
Implemented AI-based classification engine for standardized category normalization
Developed unified chronological feed with category and source filtering capabilities

summaries.one_line: Multi-source news aggregation system with web scraping, AI-based classification, and unified timeline interface
summaries.short: Built an intelligent content consolidation platform that scrapes multiple news sources, classifies articles using AI, and presents a unified categorized timeline
summaries.executive: Delivered a structured news consumption system that reduced cognitive load through AI-driven categorization and unified access across multiple sources
summaries.technical: Implemented a layered processing architecture with multi-source web scraping, AI classification engine, Flask REST API, and React-based unified timeline interface

projects.name: CopyFlow - Workflow Management System

Designed document processing as a controlled lifecycle
Enforced strict state transitions and role-based permission control
Implemented workflow management system for controlled document operations

summaries.short: Built a workflow management system that controls document lifecycle states, permissions, and role-based operations

engineering_achievements: Designed a distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing full extraction and processing cycles in approximately 5 minutes per batch, down from hours of manual effort
Automated procurement data extraction across 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines
Reduced full environment provisioning to a single-command deployment using Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and CloudFormation
Built stateless architectures enabling seamless horizontal scaling with zero downtime
Implemented comprehensive observability using Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch, AWS X-Ray, and Loki
Reduced mean time to detection on production issues through comprehensive monitoring and observability
Built event-driven processing using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and distributed tracing
Built controlled workflow systems for tax rebate processing, refund management, document lifecycle control, and multi-tenant SaaS workflow automation

capabilities.name: Full-Stack Product Engineering
capabilities.description: Designing and building complete product systems across frontend, backend, data, workflow, and infrastructure layers

capabilities.name: Backend Systems
capabilities.description: Building backend platforms with APIs, authentication, multi-tenant structures, workflow engines, data processing, and operational boundaries

capabilities.name: Distributed Systems
capabilities.description: Designing systems that use parallel workers, asynchronous queues, event-driven processing, fault tolerance, and horizontal scaling

capabilities.name: Cloud Infrastructure
capabilities.description: Designing and operating secure, scalable, observable production environments on AWS

capabilities.name: DevOps Engineering
capabilities.description: Automating build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, and environment provisioning workflows

capabilities.name: Workflow Systems
capabilities.description: Modeling operational processes as controlled workflows with explicit states, permissions, reviews, approvals, and reconciliation

capabilities.name: Event-Driven Systems
capabilities.description: Building asynchronous systems that communicate through queues, events, background workers, and pub/sub channels

capabilities.name: Real-Time Systems
capabilities.description: Building systems that communicate state changes to users through real-time interaction patterns

capabilities.name: Data Processing Systems
capabilities.description: Building extraction, aggregation, transformation, validation, and deduplication workflows for structured data pipelines

capabilities.name: Observability & Production Operations
capabilities.description: Making systems measurable, diagnosable, recoverable, and operable under production conditions

education.institution: National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (NUCES LHR)
